summary: Classified the hydrated cluster in plan mode. #89533 remains the best live canonical for the embedded trajectory documentation PR family. #89558 is related but has distinct compaction/tool-call documentation scope, so it should stay open rather than be closed as a duplicate or superseded PR. The linked closed PR #88554 is historical context only.

actions.reason: #89533 is the open representative and best canonical for the trajectory-side embedded-runner documentation work; merge remains out of scope because the job is plan mode and merge is blocked.

#89558 is in the same embedded-runner documentation family as #89533 but contains unique compaction and tool-call contract documentation, so it should not be closed as a duplicate or superseded item in this cluster.
